behavior_surfaces: desktop workflow settings toolbar/editor hover styling
state_contracts: Workflow primary action buttons may use hover:bg-[var(--color-brand-hover)].
The global desktop theme must define --color-brand-hover for light, white, and dark themes.
Workflow hover background tokens used by WorkflowTemplateManager and WorkflowTemplateEditor must resolve to defined global theme tokens.

verification.result: red before fix: failed because globals.css did not define --color-brand-hover

verification.command: cd desktop; bun run test src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx src/theme/globals.test.ts

known_unknowns: Interactive browser hover smoke was not run because Playwright is not installed in the root or desktop workspace in this environment.
Human verification in the running Tauri window is still requested for the exact screenshot interaction.
confidence_notes: The failing regression test directly matched the missing CSS variable used by workflow primary button hover classes.
The production build output contains --color-brand-hover after the fix.

boundary.scope: Fix undefined hover theme token used by workflow settings primary action buttons.
excluded: Changing workflow template API or persistence behavior
